hero.title: Your Booking & Sales Platform
hero.subtitle: The first platform to combine booking with affiliate marketing – built for tattoo studios, beauty salons, barbershops and all service providers who want to grow with influencers and partners.

footer.tagline: The modular booking & sales platform for service providers.

features.page_desc: Discover all Bookando features: Booking, Marketplace, Affiliate Marketing, Wallet, WhiteLabel, CRM and more.
features.hero_subtitle: From booking to affiliate marketing – over 40 features make Bookando the most comprehensive platform for service providers.
features.cat1_sub: Professional scheduling logic for every service provider
features.f1_desc: Public directory with search, categories and reviews. Perfect for beauty salons, tattoo studios and cosmeticians – customers find the right provider nearby.
features.f2_desc: Professional booking with real-time calendar, staff and resource management. Ideal for hair salons with multiple stylists or beauty studios with different treatment rooms.
features.f3_desc: Complete affiliate system with tracking links, commission allocation and automatic payouts. Perfect for influencer collaborations in the beauty industry.
features.f4_desc: Secure wallet system with immutable ledger entries, automatic credits and payout logic for commissions.
features.f5_desc: Your own domain, branding, colors and logos. Tattoo studios and beauty brands run their own platform on Bookando infrastructure.
features.f6_desc: Hierarchical structures for franchise systems. Central management with decentralized locations – ideal for beauty chains and barbershop franchises.
features.cat3_sub: The core of Bookando – commission-based growth
features.cat5_sub: Your own platform on Bookando infrastructure
features.cta_sub: Start now and see for yourself. 30 days free, no risk.

home.section_feature_sub: Affiliate-Marketing, Terminbuchung, Wallet, Marketplace und WhiteLabel – Bookando bildet dein gesamtes Geschäft ab.
home.how_step1_desc: Create your account as a service provider or affiliate in under 2 minutes. No credit card required.
home.how_step2_desc: Set up your services, calendar, staff and payment providers. Everything in one place.
home.how_step3_desc: Unlock affiliate marketing, acquire customers through the marketplace and scale your business.
home.cta_text: Get started and see what the platform can do for you. 30 days free trial.

pricing.page_desc: Choose the right plan for your business. 30 days free trial, no risk.
pricing.hero_sub: Start free and upgrade when you need more.
pricing.free_desc: Try all features for 30 days free. No credit card required.
pricing.faq_a1: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. All data remains yours.
pricing.faq_q2: Is there a minimum contract term?
pricing.faq_a2: No, all plans are monthly with no minimum commitment.
pricing.faq_a3: Yes, you can upgrade at any time. The difference is prorated.
pricing.standard_desc: Perfect for beginners and small teams.
pricing.fee_own_desc: Fee when you connect your own Stripe, PayPal or Mollie
pricing.fee_platform_desc: Per transaction when payment is fully handled via Bookando
